name: The Fool
affirmation: I trust the journey, even when I cannot see the destination.
meaning: A figure leaps off a cliff with complete trust in the universe.
love: A new romance is possible. Be open to unexpected encounters.
career: Take a leap of faith in your career.
health: Your body is ready for renewal.
spirituality: A spiritual awakening is beginning.
actionSteps: Say yes to something spontaneous today.
Reflect on how this card relates to your current situation
Take inspired action today
shareText: The Fool appeared for you! #Tarot #NewBeginnings

name: The Magician
affirmation: I have everything I need to manifest my desires.

love: You have all the tools you need to create the love you desire.
career: Your skills and resources are aligned for success.
health: You have the power to manifest better health.
spirituality: You are connected to infinite creative potential.

Reflect on how this card relates to your current situation
Take inspired action today

meaning: The 4 of Swords card represents new beginnings and potential in the Swords suit.
love: Clear thinking helps your relationships.
career: Mental clarity and sharp communication are your assets.
health: Mental tension may affect your body.
spirituality: Truth cuts through illusion.
actionSteps: Take one creative action aligned with swords energy today.
Reflect on how this card relates to your current situation
Take inspired action today
shareText: 4 of Swords appeared for you! Swords energy is strong! #Tarot
